evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Champion software engineering principles including TDD and CI/CD workflows
evidence.domain_risk: Build data products leveraging location signals and audience attributes
evidence.data_team_maturity: Act as technical lead for a squad, making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
evidence.jd_authorship: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Act as technical lead for a squad, making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
evidence.autonomy_level: making architectural decisions and driving cross-squad collaboration
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role designs new production-grade solutions while framing them around scalability and cost-efficiency for existing massive data volumes, combining greenfield design with scale-oriented concerns.
evidence.ai_role: Build data products leveraging location signals and audience attributes
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Data product work described without AI tools or AI-enabling infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Champion software engineering principles including TDD and CI/CD workflows
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate champions TDD, indicating ownership of quality and testing practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Design horizontally scalable, cost-efficient, production-grade data solutions for handling massive datasets
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Technical capability requirements described without operational risk, SLO, or compliance framing.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Multiple rigour signals (TDD, CI/CD, monitoring frameworks, production-grade solutions) with zero velocity signals present.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Adtech company context with user data, but no explicit language around compliance, regulatory, or financial reporting impact.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Implies existing team structure and production systems already in place, but no signals of multiple specialized sub-teams or greenfield infrastructure building.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Mostly specific technical bullets with scale numbers (multi-terabyte, massive datasets), named methodologies (TDD, CI/CD, monitoring frameworks), and domain-specific focus.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Role is framed around technical leadership, mentoring engineers, and architectural governance of the data function itself rather than serving external commercial, product, or finance stakeholders.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Decision-making authority, architectural ownership, and explicit direction-setting verbs (make, drive, establish, champion) position this as a strategic role that defines technical direction rather than executing scoped work.
